channel.title: AE Tax Advisors Blog
channel.description: Tax planning strategies, cost segregation insights, and financial guidance for high-income professionals and business owners from AE Tax Advisors.

item.title: Defined Benefit & Cash Balance Retirement Plans for Veterinarians
item.description: Defined benefit and cash balance retirement plans for veterinarians earning $200K-$500K. Shelter $209,000+/year tax-deferred.

item.title: Deferred Compensation & Equity Tax Planning for Real Estate Investors
item.description: Deferred compensation and equity tax planning for real estate investors. Optimize 409A elections, ISOs, RSUs, and profits interests to defer $187,500+/year.

item.title: Deferred Compensation & Equity Tax Planning for Business Owners
item.description: Deferred compensation and equity tax planning for business owners. Optimize 409A elections, ISOs, RSUs, and profits interests to defer $200,000+/year.

item.title: Exit & M&A Tax Strategy for Business Owners: Minimize Capital Gains
item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for business owners. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategies.

item.title: Cost Segregation for Attorneys: Accelerate Depreciation & Cut Taxes
item.description: Cost segregation studies for attorneys who own real estate. Accelerate depreciation, generate $25,000+ first-year savings. IRS-compliant engineering studies.

item.title: Exit & M&A Tax Strategy for Real Estate Investors: Minimize Capital Gains
item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for real estate investors. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategi

item.title: Deferred Compensation & Equity Tax Planning for Tech Executives
item.description: Deferred compensation and equity tax planning for tech executives. Optimize 409A elections, ISOs, RSUs, and profits interests to defer $375,000+/year.

item.title: Deferred Compensation & Equity Tax Planning for Consultants
item.description: Deferred compensation and equity tax planning for consultants. Optimize 409A elections, ISOs, RSUs, and profits interests to defer $125,000+/year.

item.title: Deferred Compensation & Equity Tax Planning for Financial Advisors
item.description: Deferred compensation and equity tax planning for financial advisors. Optimize 409A elections, ISOs, RSUs, and profits interests to defer $150,000+/year.

item.title: Exit & M&A Tax Strategy for Attorneys: Minimize Capital Gains
item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for attorneys. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategies.

item.title: Exit & M&A Tax Strategy for Tech Executives: Minimize Capital Gains
item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for tech executives. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategies.

item.title: Cost Segregation for Consultants: Accelerate Depreciation & Cut Taxes
item.description: Cost segregation studies for consultants who own real estate. Accelerate depreciation, generate $25,000+ first-year savings. IRS-compliant engineering studies.

item.title: Defined Benefit & Cash Balance Retirement Plans for Dentists
item.description: Defined benefit and cash balance retirement plans for dentists earning $300K-$700K. Shelter $249,000+/year tax-deferred.

item.title: Cost Segregation for Dentists: Accelerate Depreciation & Cut Taxes
item.description: Cost segregation studies for dentists who own real estate. Accelerate depreciation, generate $22,500+ first-year savings. IRS-compliant engineering studies.

item.title: Exit & M&A Tax Strategy for Dentists: Minimize Capital Gains
item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for dentists. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategies.

item.title: Cost Segregation for Physicians: Accelerate Depreciation & Cut Taxes
item.description: Cost segregation studies for physicians who own real estate. Accelerate depreciation, generate $30,000+ first-year savings. IRS-compliant engineering studies.

item.title: Defined Benefit & Cash Balance Retirement Plans for Business Owners
item.description: Defined benefit and cash balance retirement plans for business owners earning $300K-$3M+. Shelter $389,000+/year tax-deferred.

item.title: Defined Benefit & Cash Balance Retirement Plans for Financial Advisors
item.description: Defined benefit and cash balance retirement plans for financial advisors earning $300K-$2M+. Shelter $309,000+/year tax-deferred.

item.description: Exit and M&A tax planning for veterinarians. Reduce capital gains taxes by $500K+ on practice or business sales. IRC Section 453, 1202, and CRT strategies.

item.title: Defined Benefit & Cash Balance Retirement Plans for Physicians
item.description: Defined benefit and cash balance retirement plans for physicians earning $400K-$800K. Shelter $309,000+/year tax-deferred.
